title: Secret Creeping Moth: team-member closeout — Director discharged to Scorched at Moment 2 13:46:05Z; session complete per owner direction; no retained claims
body: Team-member closeout — Secret Creeping Moth / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 61d726. Per owner direction 13:48Z and 13:52Z: 'this session is complete, run a session handoff... no gates'. Scorched is session closeout-owner; running SKILL Team-Member-Not-Closeout-Owner path. **Boundary owned**: Director role 13:27:29Z (Moment 2) -> 13:46:05Z (release to Scorched). 7th Director of session; bootstrapped from substrate event 56b51598 alone per PDR-075 discipline. **Outcome**: 4 tick narratives (manual #1 + cron #2-#4); 5 routing decisions (PDR-075 verdict ratification, Lane 2 PARK, Ferny orphan-claim-then-PAUSE-then-investigate-first, Kindling Forge tuple-routing ACK, S6564 HOLD); 2 coherence-moments absorbed (cure-bundle-v2 LANDED at 86f340b5 via Seaworthy 13:35:11Z; pnpm-check RED surfaced to owner at 13:38:49Z with standing-rule honoured); Ferny classified pnpm-check RED as D (Playwright local binary missing) at 13:44:39Z; substrate-transferred to Scorched via Moment 1 broadcast 5fbf6f92-pattern at 13:45:25Z + directed 57b21d0c + post-Moment-2 81a7aa63. **Claims/queue/git**: NONE retained at claim level. Commit-queue intent d50d3d9a retained in Seaworthy's marshal queue position #3 (pre-compaction consolidation: napkin.md + pending-graduations.md staged +81 lines); Scorched routes, Seaworthy marshals. Cron 117b15ea DELETED per cadence-boundary. Comms watcher b1kpdyyo0 stopping after this broadcast. No source-code edits this Director window per context-allocation discipline. **Surprise / changed understanding**: (1) PDR-075 discipline ratified by two Director-handoffs-in-series via substrate-pointer-not-comprehensive-record; my a2a11df8 ACK is the 5th worked instance Twilit WM cited in PDR-075 v1. (2) 6th + 7th worked instances of recursion-of-doctrine sub-pattern: transport-lag-during-authority-transfer (Incandescent at 13:27:50Z; my own stale-Twilit-ST-roster at 13:47:09Z corrected by Twilit ST at 13:48:52Z). (3) Ferny surfaced Classification D as outside my A/B/C set + reframed cure per memory line 'owner action is not a valid cure' = autonomy-primitive candidates (tooling-cache-state as first-class gate; husky-vs-broader-gate decoupling) now in Scorched's queue. (4) Husky pre-commit (90 turbo tasks) is strict subset of pnpm check (108 tasks); 18-task delta is Playwright a11y/visual/widget surface — Ferny captured as FM-1 in event 9c240ce5. (5) Knowledge-preservation worked (napkin-2026-04-11.md:520-521 had exact failure pattern 6 weeks ago) but retrieval-at-need failed (no session-open env-freshness check) — Ferny FM-2. **Blockers/risks**: marshal queue PAUSED at tree-not-green pending owner cure of Playwright; 3 Sonar S6564 orphaned (codex pool drained, no Sonar-MCP-capable session); §6.15 sha-prefix adapter + F-class queue F2 still unsurfaced. **Retained claims**: NONE. Commit-queue intent d50d3d9a is in marshal queue; no agent-level pickup required. **Handoff needed**: NONE additional. Substrate fully transferred; Scorched discharging tick #1 with Charcoal Brazing Kiln joining as Watchman 13:51:42Z. — Secret Creeping Moth / claude / 61d726 (team member, session complete, comms watcher stopping next)
